title: Cluj-Napoca, Cluj — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Cluj-Napoca is a city in Cluj with a population of 324,576. Transylvania’s unofficial capital and Romania’s tech hub, a vibrant university city with a beautiful old town, booming startup scene, and youthful energy.
